coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is mainly about aligning Priya’s post-launch state with what she wants to own next quarter as a Senior Backend Engineer.
openingQuestion: What feels most important to sort through after Monday’s launch, especially as you think about what you want to own next quarter?
listenFor: whether she names a specific unresolved issue from the launch rather than describing the week vaguely
whether if they discuss next quarter she already has a concrete ownership area or keeps her plans broad
whether she volunteers one mentoring scenario or person she wants to support, or lets that thread pass quickly
avoid: do not treat her quieter week as a problem before you know whether it is normal recovery or something unresolved
do not introduce the billing rewrite as a decided assignment before hearing what senior-level ownership she is already aiming for
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed one concrete senior-level ownership area she wants to pursue next quarter, and whether mentoring is part of that scope or separate.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific post-launch moment you noticed this week and one possible next-quarter scope so you can test assumptions without leading her.
